creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
Give this to portmgr@ as now that pkg is using vuxml.freebsd.org for the URL's in configuration files.

There are still some concerns with enabling https by default, mainly a chicken-and-egg problem where we would need a way to reliably ship trusted root to the user (or, maybe DANE/TLSA record, but that would depend on the client side using a validating resolver), so it's likely that we would leave the https portion out for now.
